ddls:
CREATE TABLE "personal_information_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category of personal information */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the personal information category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the specific legal regulation */,
  "sensitivity_level" TEXT /* Level of sensitivity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the example belongs to */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of personal information */,
  "example_type" TEXT /* Type of example (e.g., text, number, date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collected" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of personal information */,
  "collected" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the information was collected recently */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was last collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of collection (e.g., form, API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collected_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "information_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the business purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "purpose_type" TEXT /* Type of purpose (e.g., marketing, operational) */,
  "legal_basis" TEXT /* Legal basis for the purpose (e.g., consent, legitimate interest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_disclosures" (
  "disclosure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disclosure category */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the third party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the third party */,
  "disclosure_type" TEXT /* Type of disclosure (e.g., data sharing, data sale) */,
  "contract_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the contract with the third party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disclosure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_disclosures" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale disclosure category */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the third party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the third party */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "contract_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the contract with the third party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance log entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of personal information */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., internal audit, external audit) */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor or team */,
  "non_compliance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for non-compliance if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for user consent record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing consent */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of personal information */,
  "consent_granted" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether consent was granted */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., opt-in, opt-out) */,
  "consent_revocation_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was revoked, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "third_party_name" TEXT /* Name of the third party */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided by the third party */,
  "contract_signed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a contract is signed with the third party */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the third party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., vendor, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_retention" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the retention policy */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the personal information category */,
  "retention_period" TEXT /* Retention period for the information */,
  "retention_policy_type" TEXT /* Type of retention policy (e.g., permanent, temporary) */,
  "retention_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the retention policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_retention_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id")
)
